papers.title: Lung Biobank Heidelberg: A Collection of Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer Biospecimens for Translational Research
papers.institution: Heidelberg University Hospital / DZL (German Center for Lung Research)
papers.access_route: Lung Biobank Heidelberg formal application process; DZL consortium governance; IRB approval required
papers.notes: Stage IIIB/IV NSCLC with matched serum + FFPE at -80C. Biobank infrastructure explicitly described. DZL consortium membership may be required for access. Treatment-naive cohort clearly documented.

papers.title: Profiling of cfDNA and circulating tumor DNA in treatment-naive advanced non-small cell lung cancer
papers.access_route: Corresponding author contact; Chinese multicenter IRB approval; specimen availability not guaranteed
papers.notes: Treatment-naive advanced NSCLC. Exact n not specified here — verify from abstract. Chinese multicenter cohort; cross-border specimen transfer may be restricted. Serum not described — FFPE + plasma cfDNA only, which partially matches the bundle's serum requirement.

notes: Heidelberg / DZL (PMC7481602) is the primary high-confidence retrieval target — well-indexed, biobank explicitly named, infrastructure described. The Chinese multicenter paper (PMID 29858028) is a secondary match: treatment-naive and FFPE+plasma, but serum not the primary matrix and international access barriers are real. Pipeline should retrieve Heidelberg on queries combining NSCLC + serum + stage IV + biobank. DZL keyword is load-bearing for recall.
